_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Investigation-planner projection. Derived from sourced records; ordinal/ASSESSED only; nothing invented. Source independence is counted by distinct upstream authority, not by source record.

tasks.target: one label s.r.o. (IČO 02474727, Znojmo) — jednatel roles, stakes and dates for its three co-owners
tasks.question: Vyřešit rozpor CON-02: one label s.r.o. (IČO 02474727, Znojmo) — jednatel roles, stakes and dates for its three co-owners
tasks.reason: RESOLVED 2026-07-18 from the primary register (ARES VR record for IČO 02474727, preserved and hashed): Jakub Kaman — 36 % and jednatel since 2 Jan 2014 (sole founder, 100 % until 2017); Ondřej Kaman — 34 % (49 % during 2017–2022) and jednatel since 23 Feb 2022; Radek Juhaňák — 30 % and jednatel since 23 Feb 2022, both continuously registered (the 2024-09-04 rows are re-registrations, not exits). The two mirror passes were each PARTIALLY right — their fragments were complementary, not conflicting; neither captured the whole record. See CLM-19.
tasks.recommendedSource: or.justice.cz — přímý výpis IČO 02474727 (one label s.r.o.)
tasks.whyRanked: Priorita medium: materialita=moderate, nejistota=high, zdroj=official_primary (známý veřejný zdroj).

tasks.question: Public-sector grants / EU-cofinanced projects (grant registers, CEDR/SZIF, Hlídač státu API — not queried; the Registr smluv WAS queried 2026-07-18 and returned zero contracts for both IČOs, see CLM-57).
tasks.reason: Otevřená mezera v evidenci (open_question) v dimenzi management.

tasks.question: Vyřešit rozpor CON-01: Court file number (spisová značka)
tasks.reason: The public register value (C 85425) is the authoritative one. The value on the company's own legal page (C 85424) is most plausibly a transcription error or a stale copy. This is recorded, not silently normalized.
tasks.recommendedSource: or.justice.cz — spisová značka Able.cz (C 85425)
tasks.whyRanked: Priorita low: materialita=low, nejistota=high, zdroj=official_primary (známý veřejný zdroj).

tasks.target: When Lukáš Oslzla became a Blackfish & Co. owner
tasks.question: Vyřešit rozpor CON-03: When Lukáš Oslzla became a Blackfish & Co. owner
tasks.reason: The register is authoritative for legal ownership: Oslzla's registered stake began June 2022. The 2021 media description may reflect an informal, beneficial, or agreed-but-unregistered arrangement, or simply be imprecise — the sources cannot be reconciled on the record as filed. Left visible as a contradiction between media and register.
tasks.recommendedSource: or.justice.cz — spisová značka Able.cz (C 85425)
tasks.whyRanked: Priorita low: materialita=low, nejistota=high, zdroj=official_primary (známý veřejný zdroj).
